query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_dns_requests_total' AND JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name')!='' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_dns_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='coredns_dns_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_cache_entries' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='coredns_cache_entries' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_panics_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='coredns_panics_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_reload_failed_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='coredns_reload_failed_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, type, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, type, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'type') AS type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_dns_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='coredns_dns_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, type, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, type ORDER BY time

SELECT time, rcode, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, rcode, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'rcode') AS rcode, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_dns_responses_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='coredns_dns_responses_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, rcode, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, rcode ORDER BY time

SELECT time, proto, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, proto, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'proto') AS proto, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_dns_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='coredns_dns_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, proto, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, proto ORDER BY time

SELECT time, type, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, type, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'type') AS type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_cache_hits_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='coredns_cache_hits_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, type, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, type ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='coredns_cache_misses_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='coredns_cache_misses_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
